title: facility — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for cross-branch admin dashboards; facility-level channel for the live-availability slot picker; user-level channel for a user's own booking updates + pass credit changes. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.facilities
channels.description: Tenant-wide facility + booking + day-pass + pass stream. Sink for admin dashboards showing cross-branch activity.
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Pricing changes broadcast the fact-of-change only, not before/after values.

channels.name: facility.{facilityId}.bookings
channels.description: Facility-scoped booking activity. Powers the live-availability slot picker — a booker sees new bookings appear as other users grab slots.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (facilities.view for facility_id OR platform_admin)
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to (booking_id, starts_at, ends_at, status) — never the booker's identity or price.

channels.name: user.{userId}.bookings
channels.description: Per-user booking stream + pass credit updates. Powers the my-bookings live-updates widget in the user dashboard.
events: BookingCreated (where booked_by_user_id = userId OR booked_for_user_id = userId)
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to what the user needs to render their dashboard row.
